name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Be Safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
As Imelda continues to pour rain down on Houston, please make sure that you're taking the necessary steps to stay safe. If you're in need of shelter

Friend,

As Imelda continues to pour rain down on Houston, please make sure that you're taking the necessary steps to stay safe.

If you're in need of shelter the following locations have opened their doors:
* Gallery Furniture at 6006 North Freeway
* Lakewood Church at 3700 SW Freeway
* Humble First Assembly of God Church, located at 1915 Farm to Market 1960 Bypass, Humble, TX 77338
* St. Timothy Lutheran Church, located at [14225 Hargrave Rd, Houston, TX 77070](webextlink://14225 Hargrave Rd, Houston, TX 77070 "webextlink://14225 Hargrave Rd, Houston, TX 77070")
* Sts. Simon and Jude Catholic Parish, 26777 Glen Loch Dr
* Sheldon Elementary School, 17203 Hall Shepherd Rd
* St James Catholic Church, 22800 Aldine Westfield Rd
* Humble First Assembly of God, located at 1915 FM 1960 Bypass

You can find a map of shelters [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e1cae5b07a6741a0aed539f6b6096880&_e=i9qvCWSR5sqhOSvttCcUza2nf5iwZH01jo3_nGnqBW1MaeE8U60Jw18rYtf4I2gMXd6NiMBfE-Vbxn2yAWBTLqUx74U_z38_7GAQrqjD_0CQygf1Cq24PHulOhD9c5SOWBQglVV1ui6A5PSoXggHDwAo6QjOUTykQqy_1pHrZ3IMUq0T-tgsub6Q06G3INfa_W-WfcUvmMAyFtT_hjhKvuxrx8JABK-gBZx8y7eDzhDwTz50nHmxW2xArLlItqTk5dZsk1EOA4OMxivCNsao1rbN8x8OfC_dBiI48jIXf04aWVaet7iZcj7NJyGdjil9N1SjlNS7DOkYzRz1VmM2HdOLDZLBE-jia_unXpKTKUaWfFgv8dj3PewN_IuuHDzEixNmdrxDV2z4QAYCgslgAQ%3D%3D).

If you must get on the road, please check [Houston Transtar](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e1cae5b07a6741a0aed539f6b6096880&_e=i9qvCWSR5sqhOSvttCcUzZKWp9Uqa8tLIDTp87cy8PC5_me-FavIATyGlyExDk_18GJRhYS232m3DvDCJZaPePBNFw0-Xml7gFjTjBDZZwFCG3xNoE_Xi1BbJ0O5jx43GWuZYfIMBkQfgPGVB75RIFrjDZyBPjkZgBc_bTz0nvLfuFSEYwfy8Wzkg6BjOT5Xce0kYCcObrz8qfG92ENIpK6nMpxR6tjuIZA3jeTCphLSdT-IMobNfQUjOxTymO7dtuZlLfpLdNlaGUPRS5gkx1x68Wua7RbJDFRBZc7iyjqLuzhdmqh0yhSXsn_F5LAykkwTz1sC5WYuWXU2SVEtVA%3D%3D) for more information.

To continue tracking the storm and finding more information, please visit [ReadyHarris.org](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e1cae5b07a6741a0aed539f6b6096880&_e=i9qvCWSR5sqhOSvttCcUzdkAWBqGXPRTmg2NItQLqWUj9u8Jsld5ypFbdpnIK_xhrNpeK5oK48VCqgYnRajCL5tXlCWVAeDy4ArlU0Drxx1GWgWgoreEWQ1EVHCHWIDVSk60MCAbVxPj07FbVhKDguhNBJV4Zeo14dR6xlEepg7ItmzYDbGKUPqqzRDuIgA6KUlj9H4wsNdh0vIr9d6y8GjRR9TwvC54wQfLyDrx3APqUFN_GiUMjfJl1vg-D868L6DTVgeVyAaicux001fTL07PO3EOvqpTZL22lwbsFV6hGIr0RH_9Il8w3OI6XeEO).

Stay safe and god bless,

Wesley Hunt

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Voter fraud is a myth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
As long as we have eligible American voters who cannot cast a ballot, then the system is rigged against the voters. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa518/34a064cc/18fe1a5c/703140d/277974200/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - For decades, architects of voter suppression have peddled a false narrative of rampant voter fraud as an excuse to push for new voting restrictions that target marginalized communities. Let's be clear: voter fraud is a myth. We work hard to encourage eligible folks to vote just once - no one is putting on mustaches and hats to vote multiple times. But that hasn't stopped leaders in Georgia and in Washington from perpetrating the myth. The intention behind deliberately misleading claims of voter fraud is to foster intimidation and to justify voter suppression laws and tactics. You see, not only does voter suppression work to stymie votes, it also creates an atmosphere of fear that exercising your constitutional right to vote can cost you your job or your freedom. As long as we have eligible American citizens who cannot cast a ballot, then the system is rigged against voters. Because in a democracy, every eligible voter should be able to have their voice heard and their ballot counted. The lies about supposed voter fraud will continue, so we're fighting back with the facts. [**Will you chip in whatever you can to help us combat the myth of voter fraud and overcome voting restrictions that seek to intimidate and disenfranchise eligible voters?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa518/34a064cc/18fe1a5c/703140a/277974200/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE091919MYTH") While the tactics of voter suppression may be partisan and the intended victims may be marginalized communities, broken tenants of democracy hurt us all. \- Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa518/34a064cc/18fe1a5c/703140a/277974200/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE091919MYTH")**
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa518/34a064cc/18fe1a5c/703140b/277974200/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa518/34a064cc/18fe1a5c/7031408/277974200/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa518/34a064cc/18fe1a5c/7031409/277974200/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Trump Breakfast Alert
subject: There’s still time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The President really wants to have breakfast with you. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8c397b64aabc07885382eb0da66a054a1d533d3642a693f06ed717feae0243d528f96c46197b5ccd0f9723b77974017368e4551d7dc09349)
---

Friend,

Did you see the President's email?

He personally invited YOU to have breakfast with him in New York City, and he was disappointed to see your that name was **NOT** on the first list of entries.

**President Trump REALLY wants to meet you, Friend,** so he asked us to reach out to you because he wanted to give you another chance at this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

All you have to do is contribute to win an EXCLUSIVE, VIP ALL-ACCESS trip to have breakfast with the President in beautiful NYC.
---
|
**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to be entered to win a trip to meet President Trump in New York City.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=365788db3d255d9fc80bcdaa2f2b90bedd0c8ca2e66b1db30fb16b135ae72b65465b3c3f97abbeb4553550a37f557bb8163d6409c8f1cd0c)**

We're giving President Trump the final list of American Patriots who have entered **TONIGHT,** and we don't want to give him another list without your name on it.

**Remember, if you win:**
* **You get to bring a guest of our choice**
* **We 'll cover your flights**
* **We 'll cover your hotel**
* **We 'll cover your meal**
* **AND you 'll get to take a picture with President Trump.**

The deadline to enter is 11:59 PM TONIGHT so don't wait any longer!

**[Contribute ANY AMOUNT before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to enter to win a trip to meet President Trump and to be on the final list he sees.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=07f234f815480816f5903d55ce87758b82171a1140da4a8d543ed89f202d2c014a86d935f41fa424993a925ea166c6961fda1dc90d111c9c)**

Team Trump 2020

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** Pancakes or waffles?
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=07f234f8154808160b2ac2292c41729014d7959ffb0c661d34b37a7746a48f90f9d4b16376a8ee916cd1a63ad7f2a0fce5669aba5170ea76)**

---

Friend,

It's been over four years since I took my famous escalator ride at **Trump Tower in New York City** to announce that I was running for President of the United States. Now, I'm going back to where it all began.

**I 'm having a special breakfast in beautiful NYC at the end of September and I want YOU to be my VIP ALL-ACCESS guest. **

---
| I told my team I wanted to bring someone who has been by my side from the very beginning, and I couldn't think of anyone more LOYAL or supportive than you.

We'll cover the flight, hotel, and meal for you and a guest of your choice. We can even take a photo together - all you have to do is show up.
---
|
**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT before September 20th and you will be automatically entered to win a trip to meet me in New York City.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=365788db3d255d9fc80bcdaa2f2b90bedd0c8ca2e66b1db30fb16b135ae72b65465b3c3f97abbeb4553550a37f557bb8163d6409c8f1cd0c)**

name: Team Sestak
subject: Reminder: JOIN PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE, Admiral Joe Sestak, FOR AN IMPORTANT EVENING ABOUT AMERICA'S FUTURE - Monday, September 23
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
In a time of uncertainty, with Twitter-fed presidential leadership, an economy on the brink of potential recession and a Nation fighting terrorism around the world, spend the evening with one of our Country's true leaders, and envision a bold future.

Join Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
at a Fundraiser on Monday, September 23
hosted by Edward F. Chacker and Michael T. van der Veen

•Former 3-star Admiral; commander of aircraft carrier battle group
•Interacted with Presidents, Parliamentary Members, and leaders of Ministries
•President Clinton’s Director of Defense Policy; head of Navy’s Strategic Anti-Terrorism Unit
•PhD in Political Economy & Government and Masters in Public Administration from Harvard
•Former U.S. Congressman; Vice Chairman, Small Business Committee; most productive Congressperson in his class; saved over 800 homes from foreclosure
•Elected and re-elected (by 20 points) in a 2-1 Republican Congressional District
•Challenged former Republican Senator Arlen Specter and won the primary, after being 40 points down.

Joe launched his presidential campaign on June 23 in Iowa. Only 5 weeks later he was polling at #9.

The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[Joe] impresses with experience, smarts and discipline...” and the National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.

Joe’s growing coalition is bringing together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Please come and learn more about Joe’s plans to restore trust, unity and accountability in the nation.

Monday, September 23 at 5:30 p.m.
van der Veen, O'Neill, Hartshorn and Levin
1219 Spruce Street
Philadelphia, PA 19107
Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250
To RSVP and/or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception092319]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing
a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Questions or to RSVP (and contribute at the reception): Email reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a2e3048d-a8db-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68/35b4db60-addb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWI0ZGI2MC1hZGRiLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kI4IzF1nKvL5Hw5tTp78O6iar4CJ1gLgKb4drxSef_s=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

subject: White nationalists have no place in our government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10112190/101159630/979390018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzU0ZTVhNC1iY2RiLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xeRCs6wN7Q6hfSyJuWYkXoEskNyc0Q2ixWKky4Ux7_I=&emci=a207e29d-bcdb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=7354e5a4-bcdb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
Peter,
Time and time again, Dan Crenshaw proves that he is not fit to represent and serve our district in Congress. **[Just this week, he was caught liking a post by a neo-nazi account on Instagram.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10112191/101159631/1046608657?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzU0ZTVhNC1iY2RiLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xeRCs6wN7Q6hfSyJuWYkXoEskNyc0Q2ixWKky4Ux7_I=&emci=a207e29d-bcdb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=7354e5a4-bcdb-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)**
Our district deserves a leader who will support constituents from all backgrounds. I am proud to live in such a diverse community, and it’s clear that we are not being represented properly in DC. There is no room in Houston, or in our government, for white supremacy or those who tolerate it.
Our campaign runs on the support of folks like you, who share the energy we need to make things right in 2020. **[Can you chip in today to stand in solidarity with our fight in TX-02?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10112192/101159632/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzU0ZTVhNC1iY2RiLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xeRCs6wN7Q6hfSyJuWYkXoEskNyc0Q2ixWKky4Ux7_I=&refcode=email)** We have no primary opponent, so every dollar goes straight into defeating Dan Crenshaw.
**Chip in below to help flip TX-02 and to make Dan Crenshaw a one-term Congressman.**

name: Team de Blasio
subject: A profound experience
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
I've contributed all I can to this primary.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21c56/1630b3eb/515a5260/5f549191/4162044225/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/accomplishments/?source=733_org_em_lb")
Friend,
I'm writing this to you on my last morning as a candidate for president. After several months of campaigning, I have reached a point where I feel I have contributed all I can to this primary. **[Today, I'm ending my campaign.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21c56/1630b3eb/515a5260/5f549190/4162044225/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://www.nbcnews.com/think/opinion/why-i-m-ending-my-2020-presidential-campaign-what-i-ncna1056761?source=733_org_em_lb")**

Chirlane and I to thank you for your support from the bottom of our hearts. We got into this race to make sure that working people came first on the Democratic Party's agenda again, and we wouldn't have been able to do it without your help. When you made a phone call for us or just chipped in a few dollars, you helped push the kitchen table issues affecting everyday Americans to the front of the national conversation.
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21c56/1630b3eb/515a5260/5f549197/4162044225/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjczMyJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/accomplishments/?u=?refcode=733_org_em_fr")
This campaign has been a profound experience for me. I saw America in full - not as it appears on twitter and cable news, where we're constantly shown a country hamstrung by our differences and unable to tackle the problems we face. We have more in common than we realize - and more and more of us across the country are overcoming our divisions and standing up for working people.

I visited with family farmers in Greene County, Iowa, standing up against giant agribusinesses; activists in Londonderry, New Hampshire who worked for years and years until they elected their first Democratic State Representative since the Civil War; Dreamers in Nevada, challenging long-held orthodoxies on immigration. Americans are changing our party and our country for the better.

I've worked alongside them and gotten to lift up their voices on this campaign. Soon, I'm confident they will transform this country into a place which finally delivers the rights and privileges that working people deserve. I'll continue standing shoulder-to-shoulder with them in this fight. I hope you'll stand with us, too.

Thank you for your support,
Bill de Blasio
New York City Mayor

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21c56/1630b3eb/515a5260/5f549196/4162044225/VEsC/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21c56/1630b3eb/515a5260/5f549195/4162044225/VEsD/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

subject: Georgia Senate Update: Watch my speech to Cobb County Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10117148/101199081/-1701295589?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjU4NzdiNi1jOWRiLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eO3ttr6pi1aiTYe_VAkShd4gHVJOCa6MRHdsLqGNTQA=&refcode=emheader_092119) | | Friend,

Standing up to bullies and winning unlikely victories is what I’ve done my entire life — as an attorney, a mayor, and now as a candidate for United States Senate.

Georgia Democrats made tremendous strides in 2018, and we need a tenacious, progressive candidate to lead us forward and win against David Perdue and Donald Trump. That’s why I’m running.

**[Watch my remarks to the Cobb County Democrats to see my vision for how we can win Georgia and send Perdue packing in 2020.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10117156/101199099/-302544508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjU4NzdiNi1jOWRiLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eO3ttr6pi1aiTYe_VAkShd4gHVJOCa6MRHdsLqGNTQA=&refcode=em092019-V2-B&noskip=true&refcode2=125877b6-c9db-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68)** |

---
We’re taking our message to every one of Georgia’s 159 counties in this election. We will not cede or abandon territory to Republicans when there are people waiting to hear us and shift the electoral map.

I’ve won tough elections. As mayor, I’ve dismantled dysfunctional systems and rebuilt them to better serve the city of Columbus. As a lawyer, I’ve taken on corporate corruption — against some of the most powerful companies and biggest banks in the world. That’s what I’m bringing to the fight against Perdue, Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump in this election.

[**Watch this speech, and if you're feeling inspired, chip in to support our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10117169/101199138/-302544508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjU4NzdiNi1jOWRiLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eO3ttr6pi1aiTYe_VAkShd4gHVJOCa6MRHdsLqGNTQA=&refcode=em092019-V2-B&noskip=true&refcode2=125877b6-c9db-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68)

It’s time for us to believe that we can win not just the Senate majority, but flip Georgia blue from the White House to the statehouse. With your support, I know that we will.

Yours truly,
Teresa

We'll give credit where it's due. This GOP official said it best:

Susan Collins' approval rating has fallen _44 points_ since 2017, the biggest drop of anyone in the Senate. She's the second most unpopular Senator in the country, just behind Mitch McConnell.

name: Mark Warner
subject: What do Virginia and Minnesota have in common?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
National Republicans are pouring money into turning Virginia red and unseating me next year, but they're also trying to flip Minnesota and take down Senator Tina Smith.
|
---
| | Derek, national Republicans are pouring money into turning Virginia red and unseating me next year, but they're _als_ o trying to flip Minnesota and take down Senator Tina Smith.

You may be asking: what do Virginia and Minnesota have in common?
1. Donald Trump has set his sights on **winning both states** in 2020.
2. Two former GOP Congressmen, who were both defeated after only one term, are now running for Senate against us.
3. Both of these former Congressmen have a track record of voting with Trump more than **90% of the time** during their (very) brief tenure in Congress.
4. Best of all, Virginians and Minnesotans **rejected** Trump in 2016, and in 2018 they kicked out a lot of GOP incumbents (like the ones now challenging Tina and me).

**Real quick: can you pitch in today? | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf78/3eb3e2fc/52e4b4dd/744ce0d6/2069841561/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190920_em_cover&source=20190920_em_cover")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf78/3eb3e2fc/52e4b4dd/744ce0d5/2069841561/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=20190920_em_cover&source=20190920_em_cover"). Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf78/3eb3e2fc/52e4b4dd/744ce0d4/2069841561/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=20190920_em_cover&source=20190920_em_cover"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: I’m honored
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter - I'm honored to have the support of the Sierra Club for 2020!

It's one of the most important and influential grassroots organizations, and I'm proud to keep working towards our shared mission of fighting for our precious natural resources.

**In a time when climate change denial and attacks on our environment are rampant, it 's more important than ever to defend our planet.** [Will you stand with me in the work ahead?](https://act.myngp.com/el/EGAbYHcn_xfFgWaCR1HJiGK_3nZxT4Bo732lOk5R8Ik=/WRCvp78OKFTh1f-tQDnbmsGh48DyHXMajwzIAVA24y8=)

It's our responsibility to leave a healthy and livable planet for future generations.

We're up against strong resistance from Trump and the GOP, but I know that our grassroots power can make the difference.

[Sign on to stand with me in the fight ahead to protect our climate.](https://act.myngp.com/el/EGAbYHcn_xfFgWaCR1HJiGK_3nZxT4Bo732lOk5R8Ik=/WRCvp78OKFTh1f-tQDnbmsGh48DyHXMajwzIAVA24y8=)

Thanks for all you do,
Mike

* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. name: Team Ed Markey
subject: It's official: (primary challenge) We need you in this fight >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

It's official: Joe Kennedy III will challenge Ed Markey in the primary.

_**[Ed has never backed down from fights that define our times. Will you pitch in $27 and stand with him today before our FEC fundraising deadline?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092019_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

On climate change, Ed is leading the movement for the Green New deal. He has spent his career as our country's greatest champion for clean energy jobs, and as Big Oil's greatest nightmare.

It's Ed's gun legislation that would make Massachusetts strong laws a model for the entire country.

When it comes to health care, Ed is fighting to lower drug costs, make universal healthcare a reality, and ensure protections for those with pre-existing conditions.

Ed is our greatest champion in the Senate when it comes to big issues facing Massachusetts - from the Green New Deal, to economic justice, to net neutrality, and reproductive freedom; Ed is leading the most important fights.

That's why so many Massachusetts leaders like Elizabeth Warren and progressive champions like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez are standing with Ed to help him win.

**We 've set a big FEC deadline goal of $50,000 to help send Ed back to the Senate to fight for us. Our public FEC report needs to show the broad and growing support for Ed.**

_**[Will you stand with Ed today and pitch in $27 or more to help us reach our goal?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092019_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Cory Booker
subject: The DNC is introducing new debate qualifying thresholds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| We've been called the underdog in this race -- and it's true. The fact is, I've never run for president before. And I didn't enter this race with a huge network of donors from all over the country. **And, any minute now, the DNC is going to introduce new debate qualifying thresholds.** **So, I 'm going to cut to the chase -- we need a strong showing to prove that we're in this until Election Day 2020, no matter the donor or polling thresholds that are thrown at us. Will you chip in right now to help our campaign have the resources it needs to win?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190920_CB_20190920-fr-CB-microgoalbump-actives_actives_express5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

It's a community formed around our shared vision that when we unite around our values, we will restore our sense of common purpose, expand opportunity, and ensure justice for every American. **This is our moment to take our message to the next level.** That means we need to have the resources to hit debate thresholds so I have the opportunity to participate. Because as time goes on in this race, all of America will be watching candidates in a vastly narrowed field share their visions for our country. **[This is our moment to shine and I know we can catch up. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190920_CB_20190920-fr-CB-microgoalbump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Adam Hattersley
subject: that email my campaign sent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

I included the email my campaign sent you earlier below.

Ross Spano is the definition of everything that’s wrong with American politics right now. He’s corrupt, extreme, and has no backbone when confronted with an out of control administration.

After watching Ross Spano degrade our community -- through scandals and backwards views -- I couldn’t sit on the sidelines any longer. Floridians deserve better and better is what I’ll give them.

Raising money is my least favorite part of running for Congress, but it’s an unavoidable reality. Campaigns are expensive (especially when you don’t rely on the deep pockets of beltway insiders). If we’re going to flip this seat and send Spano packing, I’m gonna need a lot of support.

Right now my campaign is facing it’s first FEC deadline at the end of the month and I really need you to help me meet our goal before it hits.

Here’s a donation link from my campaign manager: [OPEN LINK]

Whatever you can give would be appreciated!
Adam

My campaign’s email ↓↓↓↓

-----
We’ll be upfront: We’re writing to ask you to contribute toward helping us get where we need to be before the FEC deadline at the end of this month. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q32019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.09.20_b1_ah_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1]

But before we do that, we thought it might be a good idea to run through our opponent Ross Spano's disastrous record.

Did you know that Ross Spano...
➜ Wants to repeal the Affordable Care Act? Which would leave thousands of Floridians without insurance?
➜ Believes climate change is a joke?
➜ Has an A+ rating from the NRA?
➜ Is one of the most anti-LGBTQ members of Congress, and has authored legislation to allow legal discrimination against people based on sexual orientation?
➜ Is embroiled in a huge scandal about his alleged illegal fundraising tactics?

DONATE TO STOP ROSS SPANO » [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q32019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.09.20_b1_ah_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1]

We could go on, and on, and on, and on... Ross Spano is simply not good for Florida families.

Thankfully, we now have an opportunity to kick Spano to the curb with this coming election and elect a real public servant who's ready to take Florida forward -- Adam Hattersley!

If you're ready for a representative with a proven track record of standing up for our country -- both in our nation’s military and our very own State House -- we need you to donate to Adam's campaign to help him meet his goal ahead of the FEC deadline at the end of this month.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: What's next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I'm relaunching my Off The Sidelines PAC with a pledge to raise $1 million to elect women this cycle.

| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIxMzYyOTMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Peter,

Let me start by thanking you, from the bottom of my heart, for powering our campaign. It was an enormous privilege to speak with Americans about their hopes and their fears, to lift up their voices and fight for their families.

**Our campaign was a fearless declaration that women 's rights are human rights, and they're nonnegotiable. And with countless attacks on women's rights across our country, I believe that now more than ever.

That's why I'm relaunching my Off The Sidelines PAC with a pledge to raise $1 million to elect women this cycle.**

[**Peter, will you make a donation to Off The Sidelines today? Your gift will help elect Democratic women up and down the ballot this cycle and help hit my $1 million fundraising goal. It 's a tall order--but I've seen what this community can do when we come together in support of a fight we can't afford to lose.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIxMzYyOTMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

I founded Off The Sidelines eight years ago because I believed that if more women had a seat at the decision-making table, the outcomes for _all Americans_ would be better. That if women made up 50% of Congress, we wouldn't still be debating a woman's right to reproductive health care, paid family leave, or affordable child care.

The historic number of women who ran for office and won in 2018 is proof-positive that change is possible--**but we have so much work left to do.** We have a president who demeans women, punches down, and trades on hate, xenophobia, and fear. Women still make up less than a quarter of Congress, women of color even a smaller share.

[**It 's time for us to build a new table. Make a donation to Off The Sidelines today to help elect women candidates across the country.**](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjIxMzYyOTMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Some of my most inspiring moments over the past year were the times I met and spoke with young girls on the campaign trail.

They were so excited to see not just one, but SIX women running for president. Watching us showed them there's truly no limit to what they can do if they put their minds to it--and if we show them we've got their backs.

Setting that example is a responsibility I take seriously, so while my presidential campaign may have ended, I've never felt more clarity of purpose.

**We have just over 400 days to make sure Donald Trump is a one-term president, take back the Senate, and hold onto our majority in the House.**

Can I count on you to help me in this fight?
---
| Make a donation to Off The Sidelines today and help elect women candidates across the country:
---
| If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | [Donate $25](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjIxMzYyOTMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Donate $50](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjIxMzYyOTMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | [Donate $100](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjIxMzYyOTMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Other](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjIxMzYyOTMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| With so much gratitude,

Kirsten
---
| | [DONATE](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjIxMzYyOTMS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, [click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages05.net/gfppcinc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=22136293&spUserID=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&spJobID=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2&spReportId=MTU4MTIxNDI0MQS2).

body:

| Team, Michael participated in MSNBC's Climate Forum 2020, where he made clear that climate change is an existential problem.

[**The truth is that Citizens United created corruption of inaction on climate change and the next generation will be left to pick up the pieces.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf55/134673f2/aac22cf/699600d3/458166493/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/forwardonclimate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_092019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

We cannot wait any longer. We need to create durable policy on climate change now.

On Day 1, the Bennet Administration will launch an initiative to engage people from across the country to develop America's Climate Change Plan within 100 days.

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Perdue?=
subject: What 2020 Is All About
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7f616ac73f&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
This week, I joined the Erick Erickson Show to talk about what’s at stake in 2020.

[**You can listen to the full interview here.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=29a4d84f5e&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0cfafe33fe&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **This is about the future of our Republic, and the choice couldn’t be clearer.**

If we win, we can continue getting back to our Founding Principles of economic opportunity, fiscal responsibility, limited government, and individual liberty. We can keep up the momentum for our winning agenda, which has produced the greatest economic turnaround in modern history.

**However, if we fall short, America will go down the road to socialism, which has led to misery each and every time its been tried around the world. **

The stakes couldn’t be higher in this election, and no matter who our Democrat opponent is, we’re in for a tough fight. I’m humbled to have you on our team, and I’m counting on your continued support going forward.

**We have a moment of opportunity to unleash the next era of American prosperity. Let’s seize it, together.**

Thank you for everything.

David
---

name: Paul Hart
subject: He’s not wrong Fwd: putting the ‘fun’ in fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | Did you catch this doggone email? Buckaroo keeps the varmints away and turns out he's a good fundraiser too! Buck's not wrong, though. Rita is approaching her FEC filing deadline at the end of the month, and it's up to us to help keep up the fundraising pace if she's going to meet her goal. **[Help a farm dog out and send in a buck for Buck. He's always looking out for us and keeping the farm run smoothly; now he's helping out on our campaign. We all look out for each other here. Help us make a strong showing in our public filings. Chip in today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jx3Qft62ACcUi9Jt_nrICi9NaF_TPwia34J69-87lbU=/NyiTRuh3YsIx_2F4VcKVg_IEj0HU0hAZsbQsioWvA-o=?refcode=190920-email&recurring=auto)** Thank you for all that you do for Rita,
Paul Hart **\--- Original Message ---** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jx3Qft62ACcUi9Jt_nrICi9NaF_TPwia34J69-87lbU=/h3e_DB0eio50UagowOkiwhRnElDzJHa5lURCR9yrdFI=?refcode=190920-email&recurring=auto) Hi everybody! I'm Buck, Rita and Paul's dog, and I hold down the farm while they're out and about campaigning and let me tell you -- I'm the real dog in charge around here. Not a single squirrel nor rabbit gets past my watchful eye. You see, I'm great at keeping the farm safe -- it's my domain. I look out for Rita and Paul every day, but now there's a risk that I can't just bark at until it goes away. Believe me, I've tried. **[Rita and Paul are up against a lot of outside money and they're working tirelessly to fundraise enough before their end-of-quarter goal. Can you help a dog out and donate $20 right now? Growling won't work, but grassroots fundraising will.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jx3Qft62ACcUi9Jt_nrICi9NaF_TPwia34J69-87lbU=/NyiTRuh3YsIx_2F4VcKVg_IEj0HU0hAZsbQsioWvA-o=?refcode=190920-email&recurring=auto&amount=20)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jx3Qft62ACcUi9Jt_nrICi9NaF_TPwia34J69-87lbU=/NyiTRuh3YsIx_2F4VcKVg_IEj0HU0hAZsbQsioWvA-o=?refcode=190920-email&recurring=auto) Every morning, when I'm out on my patrol, I notice that Rita and Paul are up earlier and earlier. They're giving their all to this campaign, and I won't let them take on all the work. Consider me their newest _pawlitical_ advisor. **[At the farm, we all work together, and everyone has a part to play. No matter if it's raining, freezing or Christmas morning, there's work to be done. This campaign feels just like that. Help me fetch some funds for Rita and Paul -- give $20 right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jx3Qft62ACcUi9Jt_nrICi9NaF_TPwia34J69-87lbU=/NyiTRuh3YsIx_2F4VcKVg_IEj0HU0hAZsbQsioWvA-o=?refcode=190920-email&recurring=auto&amount=20)** | [🐾 CONTRIBUTE $5 🐾](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jx3Qft62ACcUi9Jt_nrICi9NaF_TPwia34J69-87lbU=/h3e_DB0eio50UagowOkiwhRnElDzJHa5lURCR9yrdFI=?refcode=190920-email&recurring=auto&amount=5)
---
[🐾 CONTRIBUTE $10 🐾](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jx3Qft62ACcUi9Jt_nrICi9NaF_TPwia34J69-87lbU=/h3e_DB0eio50UagowOkiwhRnElDzJHa5lURCR9yrdFI=?refcode=190920-email&recurring=auto&amount=10)

subject: Green and Gold for Australia at Trump’s 2nd State Dinner
body:
"Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison will dine on filet of Dover sole under the stars in a Rose Garden arrayed in shades of..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=713c5acf42&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Green and Gold for Australia at Trump’s 2nd State Dinner**

Australian Prime Minister Scott Morrison will dine "under the stars in a Rose Garden arrayed in shades of green and gold in tribute to his country’s national colors when President Donald Trump hosts his first state dinner in more than a year on Friday,” Darlene Superville reports in _The Associated Press_.

This morning, President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump welcomed Prime Minister Scott Morrison and his wife, Jenny, to the White House with a military arrival ceremony on the South Lawn. A day filled with meetings and special events will conclude with an elegant State Dinner in the Rose Garden, just outside the Oval Office.

“As he arrived in Washington on Thursday night, Morrison said he looked forward to celebrating 100 years of ‘mateship’ between the U.S. and Australia.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=180e4199de&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “In an exclusive interview on [‘Fox & Friends’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20ac05736d&e=3ee4985eea) Thursday, President Trump told Fox News' Ed Henry that ‘brand-new’ wall sections have been built along the U.S.-Mexico border, contrary to claims by some Democrats,” Edmund DeMarche writes. “Trump said the new wall sections include 14 miles at the site in California, where the interview was held. ‘This was not here two weeks ago. This is all brand-new wall. ... We're building on many different sites all up and down along the border,’ he said, adding that the new 30-foot barrier was impenetrable even by ‘championship mountain climbers.’”
---
|
---
| The immigration crisis isn’t just a matter of scope—at its root, it’s a humanitarian problem, too, John Hostettler writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=166cc5bae4&e=3ee4985eea). “The violence in countries such as El Salvador, Guatemala, and Honduras has created a demand for human traffickers whose empty promises and exorbitant fees drive and direct the flow of migrants to the border.” By keeping his campaign promise to secure our border with a wall, “President Trump is laying the groundwork for the other reforms we need to staunch the flow of human trafficking. The next step toward ending human trafficking is to fairly and uniformly enforce our asylum laws.”
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration will continue to take a tough line with China in trade talks, Vice President Mike Pence said on Thursday,” John Carney reports in [_Breitbart_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4639e75e78&e=3ee4985eea). Speaking at the CNBC Institutional Investor Delivering Alpha conference, the Vice President said that President Trump “would continue to insist that China make significant reforms to its economic system, including abandoning trade barriers, forced technology transfers, and predatory subsidies for ‘national champion’ businesses,” Carney writes.

“The era of economic surrender is over,” the Vice President said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=153627793b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95a6bb957f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=67abfc3885)

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: They're on strike. I stand with them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1a3/6cd27893/51a6f90b/158719be/2796454028/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | All across the country, young people are demanding action from us on climate change. Today, they're walking out in protest of our nation's inaction as part of a Global Climate Strike. Their demands are perfectly reasonable: they want to inherit a healthy planet, not one on the verge of ruin thanks to polluters and the politicians that enable them. Here's the good news: **When Washington's Governor Jay Inslee ran for President, he put the climate crisis front and center in the debate.** Now that he's running for re-election as Washington's governor, he's still leading this fight. **Jay and I are both ringing the climate chaos alarm bell as loudly as we can.** Republican inaction is putting our planet at risk. We have no more time to waste. Whether it's the election for Washington governor or for Oregon senator, this is one of the most pivotal elections _ever_ in our fight against climate chaos. [**Donate today and stand with me and Jay in making bold action on climate a centerpiece of this election.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1a3/6cd27893/51a6f90b/158719bf/2796454028/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-inslee?refcode=2019-09-20-inslee&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") I support the students walking out today. We owe them a future with hope and possibility. And we need their passion and energy to drive the change we all need. Fighting the climate crisis must be our leaders' top priority. It is for me, and it is for Jay. [**That's why I'm asking you to stand with me and Jay Inslee. Donate today and let's put climate chaos at the top of the 2020 ballot.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1a3/6cd27893/51a6f90b/158719bf/2796454028/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-inslee?refcode=2019-09-20-inslee&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jay Inslee and Jeff Merkley instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1a3/6cd27893/51a6f90b/158719bc/2796454028/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-inslee?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-09-20-inslee&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1a3/6cd27893/51a6f90b/158719bd/2796454028/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-inslee?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-09-20-inslee&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1a3/6cd27893/51a6f90b/158719ba/2796454028/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-inslee?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-09-20-inslee&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1a3/6cd27893/51a6f90b/158719bb/2796454028/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-inslee?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-09-20-inslee&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Why I'm striking with students right now:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Show them we have their back.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/climate-strike/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&utm_campaign=climate-strike&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=7956%2E868730%2EkLZeao) Friend, Today, activists on six continents will go on strike for our climate -- and I'm joining them today in Seattle and Spokane. This is one of the largest environmental protests in history. It's just like Greta Thunberg says: "If there is one day you should join, this is the day." **So I'm joining, and if you can where you are, you should too -- but no matter what, these climate strikers need to know we have their back.** [**Add your name next to mine to support the Climate Strike today!**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/climate-strike/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&utm_campaign=climate-strike&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=7956%2E868730%2EkLZeao) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/climate-strike/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&utm_campaign=climate-strike&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=7956%2E868730%2EkLZeao)
---
I'm proud to join strikers in Seattle and Spokane, especially because we're just a few of the millions striking today. Communities across the country and around the world are taking action during the entire "Week for Future and Climate Justice."
Led by youth climate leaders, people will walk out of school and work to join mass marches and rallies, music concerts, sit-ins, and nonviolent direct action. I'm excited to join the strikers today because I know that here in Washington state, defeating climate change must continue to be our top priority.
In Washington, we are moving off coal by 2025 and moving to 100% clean energy. We've passed a landmark energy efficiency bill for buildings. Our efforts to protect Washington's clean air and water, invest in people's economic security, and stand up for the values of inclusivity and diversity have created thousands of clean energy jobs and made Washington state "the epicenter of resistance to Trump's agenda." And we've only just begun.
**That's what this strike is all about: to prove that progress is possible if we commit to it and commit now. I'm committed -- are you?** [**Add your name next to mine to support climate strikers across the country today.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/climate-strike/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&utm_campaign=climate-strike&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=7956%2E868730%2EkLZeao)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/climate-strike/?utm_source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&source=ema_2019-09-20_climate-strike&utm_campaign=climate-strike&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=7956%2E868730%2EkLZeao)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=7956%2E868730%2EkLZeao). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump "jokes" about not relinquishing power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, This week has been a whirlwind of new revelations about Trump, his political corruption, and the damage he's doing to this nation. First, a bipartisan Senate committee released their findings that Trump's two government shutdowns in 2018 and 2019 cost taxpayers more than $2.3 billion dollars and amounted to almost 27,000 years of lost productivity for federal workers. Now, we're learning that Trump made such an egregious breach of protocol when he was speaking with some foreign leader about a "promise" that an intelligence official felt the need to file a formal complaint. This raises major concerns about corruption and cover-ups in the administration, as well as whether a president who doesn't think the law applies to him can be trusted with American intelligence. All the while, Trump has been joking about not relinquishing power, tweeting a photo last week of a campaign sign that read "Trump - Keep America Great! - 2024." This isn't funny or amusing \-- this madman in the White House has got to go. He places everyone on the planet in danger with his quixotic bullying and rash, poorly thought-out decisions. He doesn't listen to his advisors, he cozies up to dictators, and he wants to trash the Earth. We cannot give him the chance to stay on longer and do even more damage. Democrats have the power to begin impeachment proceedings, but they're dragging their heels, so please let us know: **Should we impeach Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd00/6e9863e8/14fd962a/1db0de29/184231215/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/DaWrhV2v") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd00/6e9863e8/14fd962a/1db0de29/184231215/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/DaWrhV2v") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd00/6e9863e8/14fd962a/1db0de28/184231215/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190920a.ND-b&refcode2=lOwX1cE9QFdAxcrZTWwr")
---

name: Warren HQ
subject: Elizabeth wants to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
After each town hall Elizabeth hosts, she stays afterwards to talk with every supporter who wants to meet her (and take a selfie, of course). | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285298ab/45c30650/1378012fc/668a1eda/2293299667/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
After each town hall Elizabeth hosts, she stays afterwards to talk with every supporter who wants to meet her (and take a selfie, of course).

She stays because it's her chance to learn about what brings people into this fight. No matter how long it takes -- even up to four hours like what happened in New York on Monday -- she'll shake hands, give hugs, and exchange a few important moments with the people that are powering this movement.

Elizabeth doesn't want to spend her time hearing about the issues that Wall Street bankers, powerful corporate interests, or federal lobbyists care about. She wants to hear from you.

**We know there isn't always an event close by, or sometimes you can't wait in line for a chance to chat, so we wanted to give you the chance to tell her today.

[ What brings you into this fight? Please fill out this two-minute survey to share with Elizabeth the issues most important to you:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285298ab/45c30650/1378012fc/668a1edd/2293299667/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo2NVBfRUdSX0lTU19RXzIwMTkwOTIwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMJ65P_EGR_ISS_Q_20190920_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

This campaign isn't just about Elizabeth's vision. It's about the hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you. It's about the issues that you think about, and the dreams that you're fighting for.

Elizabeth wants to put the issues this team cares about front-and-center in this campaign -- but we can't do that without your help.

**[Click here to take the two-minute survey to share your priorities and let Elizabeth know why you're in this fight.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285298ab/45c30650/1378012fc/668a1edd/2293299667/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo2NVBfRUdSX0lTU19RXzIwMTkwOTIwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMJ65P_EGR_ISS_Q_20190920_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thank you,

Team Warren

| [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285298ab/45c30650/1378012fc/668a1edd/2293299667/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo2NVBfRUdSX0lTU19RXzIwMTkwOTIwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMJ65P_EGR_ISS_Q_20190920_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: Team Weld
subject: this is what happens when actions don’t have consequences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCClO56WzogX0aL-gtkAE82w&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190920_fr&n=1) What happens when Donald Trump doesn’t learn that actions have consequences? He turns right around and does them again — **and asking for foreign interference in our elections is no different.** Don’t believe us? The President’s personal lawyer admitted as much on national tv last night! [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCClO56WzogX0aL-gtkAE82w&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190920_fr&n=2) In 2016, President Trump went up on stage and asked Russia to hack Hillary Clinton’s emails — and they did. **And now in 2019, he’s trying to use his power in office as leverage to convince another foreign country to interfere in our presidential elections on his behalf.** This is just another example of why we need to do everything in our power to make Donald Trump a one-term president. **His self-serving actions as President of the United States are destroying the fabric of our democracy and the integrity of our electoral process.** [**We’ve got to stop him now before it’s too late. Can you chip in $20.20 to help us build the movement we need to kick this corrupt president out of office?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCClO56WzogX0aL-gtkAE82w&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190920_fr&n=3) Team Weld | | [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCClO56WzogX0aL-gtkAE82w&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190920_fr&n=4)
---

You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190920_fr&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190920_fr&n=7).

name: Opinion Research Team
subject: Team, we need to hear from you today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends,

Michael is on the road, traveling across Iowa and talking with voters about the issues most important to them heading into 2020.

**Polling shows[ that 9 out of 10 voters have not yet decided which candidate they'd like to support - but they do know the issues they're passionate about.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf51/134673f2/aaed124/69960147/990267852/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://bennet.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/sept-short-survey?refcode=EM_SURV_B2_092019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")**

body:
Friend, Now more than ever it is important to support President Donald Trump. The New Hampshire Trump Victory Team is joining 16 other states for a [National Day of Action this **Tuesday, September 24 th**](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyE0a8pfF-2FTvGVznY-2FCKB9JflLGM7kFG70lYYXij42U9CbMyRK1Ie1ByO-2FAqpE7xlGXjVR4CDERhQyBPXGT-2BNmpOHmeWLvPfD7XoFC2-2FwFLp-2Bg1IZBY0VxhfUZBfGIykG1A-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MaTw-2FO-2BzJ72nz7Ox7jfIR8KcnolcSuJ1nRcXzCMlrsMhHkEYuqbcJrhUqwzfy6lYDmPciFTkz1wmN-2Fq01YdxGr-2FXJ7olBPu6vBIjGONMzRPGrR82GPFATNyXa1ia9DFcKB9yYPqUjrQAVK3p-2BndcQHv1S-2Bz6YFkTu-2Bj6zZ67-2B2h72wo8YM1BHNGqkAtgOVdvqqmXyivLHDVhrIYRsdMz0vR6IS6MKLpUcYVgHI-2BhorxneAzPYV4QFlRM8NfEgV9Eu-2FisFMVafgv-2BdWvH3ALGOBg-3D-3D). President Trump is delivering on his promises to America and Governor Sununu is delivering on his promises to New Hampshire. We won in 2016 because thousands of patriots wanted to see real change made in Concord and Washington. Now, our economy is growing, our country is safer, and the wall is being built - even with the Democratic Party becoming more and more radical every day. **It is our job to Keep America Great.** Join the New Hampshire Republican Party and the New Hampshire Trump Victory team by knocking doors for President Trump, Governor Sununu, and Representative Michael Vose! **Join us as we engage with voters and work to re-elect President Trump and elect Republicans up and down the ticket in 2020.** **Trump Victory National Day of Action** 4pm-7pm on September 24th, 2019 62 Calef Highway Epping, NH 03042 We look forward to seeing you on Tuesday! Any questions please contact me at 719-314-6878 or [brahn@gop.com](mailto:brahn@gop.com "brahn@gop.com"). On to victory, Brianna Rahn Regional Field Director

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Election Day should be a holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, America has long exalted its elections as pinnacles of democracy that other countries should aspire to. But our voter turnout is some of the worst amongst democracies, with even the historic 2018 midterms only seeing about half of eligible voters show up to the ballot box. That means that our current government is only reflective of half the population, which doesn't sound like democracy at all. As part of their landmark election reform bill, the For the People Act, House Democrats proposed that Election Day be made a national holiday. With this change, many people won't have to take time off from work to vote, increasing turnout. Mitch McConnell, though, refuses to let the Senate vote on this, saying that allowing more people to vote is a Democratic "power grab." According to Mitch, increasing democracy is bad for democracy. [**If you think that Election Day needs to be a national holiday and that Mitch McConnell is flat-out wrong, please add your name to this petition today. Tell Mitch to bring this bill to a vote and allow our democracy to grow today!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd01/6e9863e8/14ffc169/1db0dee9/2187031661/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/election-day-national-holiday/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing for democracy! The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd01/6e9863e8/14ffc169/1db0dee9/2187031661/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/election-day-national-holiday/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Seven Weekends
body:
Seven weekends. There are just seven weekends remaining until Election Day 2019. In just a matter of weeks, Hoosiers will go to the polls and will....

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/seven-weekends?e=1acd9bb3d6)
Seven Weekends

Seven weekends. There are just seven weekends remaining until Election Day 2019.

In just a matter of weeks, Hoosiers will go to the polls and will vote in critical municipal races to elect our leaders closest to home – our mayors, our city councilors and our other city/town leaders. It’s these leaders who frequently have the biggest impact in our lives – and it’s these races where you can also have the biggest impact.

Across the state, we have Republican mayors making a big difference. They’re leading major infrastructure investments, they’re attracting new jobs, they’re making their communities safer and they’re advancing quality of life. And we also have several communities throughout Indiana where we’re very close to electing a Republican mayor to start delivering results.

But this can’t happen – or continue to happen – without your work over the next seven weekends. We need your help knocking on doors and making phone calls for campaigns across the entire state (one likely very close to you) to help make sure our candidates win. We’re organizing Super Saturday events (http://indiana.gop/2019supersaturdays?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to make this easy. With these Super Saturdays, we’ve planned where we need people and when we need people there. All you need to do is RSVP (http://indiana.gop/2019supersaturdays?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and we’ll be in touch to help you sign-up for a shift. It’s that easy to make a big difference.

Seven weekends. There are just seven weekends left to make a difference in our 2019 municipal election. Are you in?

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Chairman Kyle Hupfer spoke to supporters at Governor Eric Holcomb's annual Sporting Clay Shoot this week, highlighting the incredible results that Governor Holcomb is delivering for Hoosiers and the campaign's strength going into the fall.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Indiana Leads the Way!

It’s been another busy week for Governor Holcomb! This included participating in the third meeting of President Trump’s American Workforce Policy Advisory Board and speaking at the Forbes AgTech Summit in Indianapolis. At both events, he was able to share how Indiana is leading the way – both when it comes to skilling-up our workforce and developing the latest agricultural innovations!
* At the Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater Washington, Governor Holcomb presented on work he’s helping lead for the national workforce board. And that work is all based on the great successes we’re seeing in Indiana to skill-up Hoosiers for today’s high-wage, in-demand jobs.
* At the Forbes AgTech Summit (held in Indiana for just the second time!), Governor Holcomb highlighted how Indiana is a leader in agricultural innovation when it comes to our heritage, growth, location, companies, top talent and so much more. The Forbes AgTech Summit brings top leaders in tech and global agriculture to discuss solutions to the world’s food supply challenges.

Governor Holcomb is showcasing Indiana’s achievements and the hard work of all Hoosiers to the rest of the country and the world!
Get Active: Super Saturdays 2019

There are only seven Saturdays left until 2019 Election Day, and we need your help to make sure our Republican mayoral, city council and other municipal candidates win. Sign-up now to volunteer for an upcoming Super Saturday! (http://indiana.gop/2019supersaturdays?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

As part of our upcoming Super Saturdays, we have seven opportunities throughout Indiana over the next seven weekends for you to volunteer on several down-to-the-wire races where your work could help set our candidates over the top -- making sure that they cross the finish line first.

We need YOU to make all of this possible! This is your chance to be a Republican superhero for our mayoral candidates.

Saturday, September 21
Kokomo Mayoral Candidate Tyler Moore

Saturday, September 28
Fort Wayne Mayoral Candidate Tim Smith
RSVP Here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-party-super-saturday-fort-wayne-sept-28th-tickets-73597304519?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Saturday, October 5
Lawrence Mayor Steve Collier
RSVP Here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-party-super-saturday-city-of-lawrence-tickets-73597543233?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Saturday, October 12
Muncie Mayoral Candidate Dan Ridenour
RSVP Here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-party-super-saturday-muncie-tickets-73598012637?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Saturday, October 19
New Albany Mayoral Candidate Mark Seabrook
RSVP Here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-party-super-saturday-new-albany-tickets-73598122967?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Saturday, October 26
Fort Wayne Mayoral Candidate Tim Smith
RSVP Here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-party-super-saturday-fort-wayne-tickets-73590676695?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Saturday, November 2
State Party HQ Phone Bank
RSVP Here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/indiana-republican-party-mayoral-phone-bank-tickets-73598391771?aff=odeimcmailchimp&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We hope to see you at one of our Super Saturdays to make a difference in these critical races!
Fall Dinner 2019: Celebrating Our Military

This year's Team Holcomb Fall Dinner (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c4c6804b0d&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) is one you won't want to miss! We're excited to welcome Congressmen and combat veterans Jim Baird, Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw as the event's special guests on October 14 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

These three American heroes have made so many sacrifices in the name of freedom. Of course, we already know Indiana's own Congressman Jim Baird, and you may remember Congressman Crenshaw from when he was unnecessarily mocked on Saturday Night Live, but this trio made national headlines when Congressman Mast's tweet (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ec3b72c460&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American." went viral.

Help us celebrate our military by booking your tickets for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2e05d1282&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) now!

--> Reserve your seat here <-- (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5931dde43f&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Next Weekend: National Federation of Republican Women Convention Coming to Indiana!

It’s almost here! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis next weekend -- September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

Learn more about the convention here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a9aa14ff6&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , learn about sponsorship opportunities here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b16eb99306&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and register to attend the national convention here (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bcf146b3a5&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Upcoming Republican Events

September 21 (http://indiana.gop/events/parke-county-gop-golf-scramble?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Parke County GOP Golf Scramble
September 21 (http://indiana.gop/events/brown-county-gop-bbq?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Brown County GOP BBQ
September 23 (http://indiana.gop/events/clay-county-republican-candidate-greet-and-meet?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Clay County Republican Candidate Greet & Meet
September 26 (http://indiana.gop/events/nfrw-convention?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : National Federation of Republican Women Convention
October 5 (http://indiana.gop/events/clay-county-republican-bbq-and-pie-auction?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Clay County Republican BBQ and Pie Auction
October 14 (http://teamholcomb.gop/upcoming-events/fall-dinner?mc_cid=7add352fde&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Team Holcomb Fall Dinner
October 23 (http://indiana.gop/events/huntington-county-republican-party-under-dome?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Huntington County GOP "Under the Dome"
October 28 (http://indiana.gop/events/orange-county-fall-dinner-1?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Orange County Fall Dinner
December 6 (http://indiana.gop/events/greater-indianapolis-republican-womens-club-holiday-luncheon-and-silent-auction?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Greater Indianapolis Republican Women's Club Holiday Luncheon and Silent Auction

**Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at info@indiana.go (mailto:info@indiana.go) p (mailto:info@indiana.go) ! **

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb named Indiana Chamber's Government Leader of the Year (http://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/41072240/holcomb-honored-governor-eric-holcomb?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch visits Dearborn County to support tourism (https://www.eaglecountryonline.com/news/local-news/lieutenant-governor-visits-dearborn-county-to-support-tourism/?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Todd Young advocates for families in international adoptions (https://www.wibc.com/news/local-news/video-sen-young-how-international-adoption-was-stopped-then-saved?mc_cid=6c30438b72&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

body:

| | This is a national EMERGENCY -- Donald Trump is trying to interfere in the 2020 election. Rudy Giuliani just admitted President Trump is trying to collude with ANOTHER foreign power. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - This is a national EMERGENCY -- Donald Trump is trying to interfere in the 2020 election: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06cb/72412298/41d91a48/61034cde/2830698760/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/signon_impeachtrump?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190920_Giuliani_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190920_Giuliani_U1_X1") Rudy Giuliani just admitted President Trump is trying to collude with ANOTHER foreign power. And now that we have clear evidence that Trump conspired to steal the 2020 election, House Democrats MUST start impeachment proceedings on Trump. **[Add your name to our emergency petition if you agree that the House must finally act to impeach the president>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06cb/72412298/41d91a48/61034cc1/2830698760/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/signon_impeachtrump?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+our+emergency+petition+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190920_Giuliani_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190920_Giuliani_U1_X1")** | | | [Sign on ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06cb/72412298/41d91a48/61034cc0/2830698760/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/signon_impeachtrump?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Sign+on+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190920_Giuliani_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190920_Giuliani_U1_X1")

The security of our entire election system is at risk.
Trump is acting like an authoritarian, not the leader of the democratic free world. He's proving that we can't wait until 2020 to remove him from office -- we need to act now.
**[And with a Democratic majority in the House, it's absolutely necessary that we begin proceedings. Add your name if you agree >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06cb/72412298/41d91a48/61034cc3/2830698760/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/signon_impeachtrump?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+And+with+a+Democratic+majority+in+the+Ho&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190920_Giuliani_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190920_Giuliani_U1_X1")**

Please sign the emergency petition -- the whole world is watching.
