| | **Trump to New Mexico crowd: "Who do you like more, the country or the Hispanics?"** My blood is boiling.

Trump just held a rally here in my home state. He insulted our families, threatened to take our state for Republicans, and said he'd sabotage Democrats' shot to win the Senate. **His threat is so dangerous, I just launched my emergency Anti-Trump Fund to WIN my Senate race, HOLD New Mexico for Democrats, and PROTECT this critical state from Republican grasps.** | **ANTI-TRUMP FUND: [ACTIVE](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190920_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

_**[Suggested Support to Keep New Mexico Blue: $5>>](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190920_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**_

name: Mike Franken
subject: The NRA is Bat$#!% crazy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Straight talk is the only way to address gun violence. The NRA and gun manufacturers, who want to arm teachers are bats***t crazy.
|
---

| | Friends -- Bats***t crazy. That's what I said about the NRA and the gun manufacturers who contend arming teachers is a way to prevent school shootings. | [Stop the NRA!](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245c/33365068/4a6658c4/3f8baa57/1245757691/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://mfranken.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-the-nra")
---
Like many of you, my rural upbringing included exposure to firearms. My dad gave me a BB gun for my eighth birthday; a hand-me-down bolt-action .22 caliber rifle soon followed, then a heavy 410 shotgun came when I turned 12. Those were my firearms until I found I needed a bigger 12-gauge bang for duck season many years later.
Common sense ruled in the Franken family. Any thought of purchasing a military grade weapon would have been met with near ridicule.
Fast-forward the clock and introduce the power of money, greed, and political persuasion, and you have today. The NRA convolutes our Constitution for their narrow purposes wrapped in a byzantine organization. They insist, contrary to what society decided in the 1934 National Firearms Act, for example, that the NRA knows what's best to make society safe.
Bizarro.
What they are really saying is that they know what's best for them to make gobs of cash and to sway weak-spined politicians. The NRA wants all civilians to have access to the same weapons I qualified on to deploy to combat theaters. We're talking about irresponsible gun owners having access to some of the most destructive weapons on the market.
[**Universal background checks must be mandatory -- for all weapons. And there is no use for large magazines in semi-automatic firearms.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245c/33365068/4a6658c4/3f8baa57/1245757691/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://mfranken.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-the-nra")
Iowans appreciate straight talk. That's why I'm not going to hide from the NRA and gun manufacturers, who want to distract us. We need to tackle gun violence head on. Join me in telling the NRA that we need serious solutions to gun violence. Anything else is bats***t crazy.
[Stop the NRA!](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245c/33365068/4a6658c4/3f8baa57/1245757691/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://mfranken.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-the-nra")
---
Very respectfully,
Mike Franken

|
---

| | Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

PO Box 3171
Sioux City, IA 51102

At events across the country, we're hearing the same chant: "Two cents! Two cents! Two cents!"

It's not just a chant. It represents all the big, structural change -- from Universal Child Care to student debt cancellation -- that we can create with just the Ultra-Millionaire Tax. Working families are ready for change, and this election is our chance to turn these ideas into reality.

But first, we have to keep building this movement -- and that happens one grassroots donation at a time.

**This sticker is one of the ways we're saying thanks to the grassroots donors who make this movement possible.

[Will you chip in for the first time before midnight to get your "Two Cents" sticker before they're gone?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285298b7/45c30650/1376d505b/668a0686/1015685958/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWQzLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSjY5Rl9TVEtfTENOX0NfMjAxOTA5MjBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-d3-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ69F_STK_LCN_C_20190920_V1S3_P")**

Thanks again for all you do,

Team Warren

body:
Student activists around the world are leading strikes ahead of the United Nations' Climate Action Summit.
---
| | GLOBAL CLIMATE STRIKES HAPPENING NOW: Student activists around the world are leading strikes ahead of the United Nations' Climate Action Summit.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **GLOBAL CLIMATE STRIKES HAPPENING NOW** [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbe4/3219314245/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2") Student activists around the world are leading strikes ahead of the United Nations' Climate Action Summit. Their mission: push world leaders to take transformative action on climate change by _DISRUPTING BUSINESS AS USUAL._ **Our next generation has the most to lose from climate change.** Failing crops, water scarcity, and rising sea levels could displace **143 million people** by 2050. That's why young people are standing up -- And they're urging others to join! [**Sign our petition to stand in solidarity with youth climate activists on strike right now >>**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbe3/3219314245/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Sign+our+petition+to+stand+in+solidarity&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2") | | | [#ActOnClimate](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbe2/3219314245/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+ActOnClimate&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2")
---
* * *
**16 year-old Swedish activist Greta Thunberg had a strong message for Congress:**
[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbe1/3219314245/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2")
The United States is the second-largest emitter of carbon emissions in the world. _Yet, Trump and his obstructionist allies in the Senate are moving us backwards on climate change_ by propping up dirty fossil fuels and withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement.
These students are bravely calling out world leaders and DEMANDING action before it's too late. [**Add your name to stand with these inspiring activists and join the fight for the future of our planet!**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbe0/3219314245/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Add+your+name+to+stand+with+these+inspir&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2")
| | [I'm in!](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbef/3219314245/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Irsquom+in&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2")
---
Thank you,
314 Action

| [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbee/3219314245/VEsB/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://www.314action.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2")

| | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbed/3219314245/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://www.314actionfund.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2"), not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbec/3219314245/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbeb/3219314245/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47b6/4bd7760e/42b8b842/77e0fbea/3219314245/VEsHBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2&source=314_EM_EN_190920_GlobalClimateStrike_U1_X2")

name: =?utf-8?q?Jen_O=E2=80=99Malley_Dillon=2C_Beto_for_America?=
subject: An important update on our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

I want to be honest with you about the state of the campaign before I ask
you for your help. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34594?refcode=ema20190920-56407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=56407%2E444211%2EIz0KwE ]But if you’re ready to donate now, you can skip to
that part.

What we’ve built here is a bit of a unicorn in modern politics — very few
campaigns pull it off. A nationwide campaign funded by grassroots donors.
The vast majority of our money is donated online, most of it from emails
like this one!

So we’re very lucky for — and thankful to — the 226,461 donors who own a
piece of this campaign. Now, I want to get into the lay of the land.

Other candidates...

Tom Steyer has already spent several million dollars of his own money.
Bernie Sanders announced yesterday he has 1 million donors. Pete
Buttigieg, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden were scheduled to attend at least
43 high-dollar fundraising events in the last couple weeks of the quarter.

Meanwhile, Beto’s visited Skid Row, Aurora, Colorado, and a weed
dispensary in Oakland. Most of our time is going to meeting with people
and making connections with voters. We don’t expect our fundraising total
this quarter to beat every one of these folks — and we certainly can’t
afford to write ourselves million-dollar checks like Tom Steyer. 😂BUT, we
have you! I’ll take hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters over
one billionaire donor any day.

Our numbers...

We saw a real surge in donations after Beto’s breakout debate performance.
It was some of our best fundraising of the campaign! But, we had a slower
July to make up for. Plus, in August, we stopped sending our normal
fundraising emails for two weeks while we grieved with the people of El
Paso.

The outlook...

I wish it weren’t the case, but one of the biggest ways presidential
candidates get evaluated is by how much money they can raise. In 10 days,
we will close the books for our FEC deadline, and reporters and pundits
will scour the numbers.

If you post good numbers, people say good things about your campaign. If
you post bad numbers, they say you’re doomed! Of course, we know we’re on
the right track. If we keep pressing, we’ll have the resources we need to
win.

The goal...

Here’s the big announcement. We are setting a $750,000 online goal
starting today through the end of the quarter. That means every day we
need to raise about $75k. With an average contribution this quarter of
$22.63, we essentially need 3,315 Beto supporters to donate each day going
forward.

Goal: $750,000 in 10 days

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34594?refcode=ema20190920-56407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=56407%2E444211%2EIz0KwE ]We can’t fall short in this FEC report, so we need to make a BIG push.
Can you be one of the first to make a $3 donation towards
our goal now?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34594?refcode=ema20190920-56407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=56407%2E444211%2EIz0KwE ]Donate $3 now

Without a dime from PACs, lobbyists, or special interests, the only way
for Beto to win this primary and defeat Donald Trump is through hundreds
of thousands of people stepping up to donate. So whether you give $1 or
$100, it’s not important. It’s just about everyone giving something, and
being in this movement together.

The team will be reaching out with a lot of updates over the next 10 days
as we reach for this goal, but [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34594?refcode=ema20190920-56407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=56407%2E444211%2EIz0KwE ]I hope you’ll consider kicking us off
well by contributing today.

Thanks for all you do,

Jen O'Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190920footer&t=1023&refcode2=56407_444211_Iz0KwE&akid=56407%2E444211%2EIz0KwE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=56407%2E444211%2EIz0KwE

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Corrupt power couple in Elaine Chao and Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Secretary of Transportation Elaine Chao (who just so happens to be Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell's wife) is now under investigation by the House Oversight Committee. She is accused of using her position to get her family members lucrative business opportunities and loans, allegedly totalling in the hundreds of millions of dollars. This comes after she appointed a special liaison to help with grant applications that benefit Kentucky \-- which just so happens to be the state that McConnell represents in the Senate. Her unethical behavior resulted in at least $78 million being spent in Kentucky ahead of her husband's impending re-election bid. She and Mitch are true partners in crime, steering this country down a corrupt path \-- he has been following Trump's every wish and command since he was inaugurated, helping him try to overturn the ACA, forcing through his woefully underqualified and partisan judges, and ensuring Brett Kavanaugh's lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court. This is not the leadership our country needs. We need people who are going to listen to constituents, collaborate with stakeholders, and behave ethically to move this country forward. We're asking voters what they think about this new development, and we need 105 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell and Elaine Chao?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd03/6e9863e8/14f951fe/1db0d885/598978467/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/SUlctqWS") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd03/6e9863e8/14f951fe/1db0d885/598978467/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/SUlctqWS") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd03/6e9863e8/14f951fe/1db0d88b/598978467/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=WDTO20190920c.ND-b&refcode2=r34ifbbxVDZ22Anmu8cY")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd03/6e9863e8/14f951fe/1db0d889/598978467/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

I’m sure you’ve heard that I am not the only Republican in this race, but I am the only conservative who has what it takes to win next November. Can I count on your support? We cannot do this without you and your support! Thanks for your help, Brandon | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Beach for Congress | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

body:
| | | Since Michael hasn't spent a lifetime in politics, many voters are just learning about him.

We launched our first major TV ads to make sure Democrats in early states know exactly what Michael stands for.

We'll be honest, though, it's expensive. But there's too much at stake not to go all in!

[Every day we air these ads, it helps our standing in the polls -- and that could help Michael reach future debate stages, too. So we're asking you for help: It would mean so much if you'd rush $25 to keep these new ads on the air >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf4c/134673f2/aa1fde1/6996032a/1200011673/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-ad?refcode=EM_FR_B3_092019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Yang2020
subject: We're used to this by now but...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
By now we’re pretty used to being ignored by the mainstream media.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=619%2E377263%2Eaez1Eh) Friend --

By now we’re pretty used to being ignored by the mainstream media.
* After hitting both requirements for the 2nd and 3rd debate stage? Crickets.
* After placing 4th in an Emerson poll of California Democratic primary voters? Crickets.
* After polling at 4% nationally in a new NBC / Wall Street Journal poll? Crickets.

But now we saw an article that said we are getting _too much_ media attention. Give us a break.

**The media can try to dismiss us all they want, but the numbers don’t lie. Math is math.

[ Soon our fundraising numbers will be public, so let’s show them what this campaign is truly made of -- grassroots donors like you. Pitch in $5 or more before our end-of-quarter deadline so everyone can see how people-powered this campaign is. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10251?t=5&akid=619%2E377263%2Eaez1Eh) **

Just look at this chart that shows how little speaking time Andrew was given during the debate last week: [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10251?t=8&akid=619%2E377263%2Eaez1Eh) This is why we’re relying on you, friend.

If we can hit our end-of-quarter goal, we will send a message that speaks louder than a few missed minutes at a debate. If our Q3 fundraising haul is big enough, we will show we can keep pace with mega-donor funded establishment candidates, and **journalists won’t be able to ignore us.** | [pitch in ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10251?t=7&akid=619%2E377263%2Eaez1Eh)
---

We’ll keep you updated on our progress.

Thank you,
Yang2020 **Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10251?t=6&akid=619%2E377263%2Eaez1Eh)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=619%2E377263%2Eaez1Eh) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=619%2E377263%2Eaez1Eh) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
